pr_body: Adds an encrypt() helper built on a DES cipher.
author: contributor

files.patch:
@@ -1 +1,6 @@
 from Crypto.Cipher import DES
+
+
+def encrypt(data, key):
+    cipher = DES.new(key)
+    return cipher.encrypt(data)

analyze: {"findings": [{"finding_type": "weak_crypto", "evidence_tier": "judged", "query_match_id": null, "trace_path": null, "title": "DES is a broken cipher in encrypt()", "description": "encrypt() builds a DES cipher; DES has a 56-bit key and is brute-forceable. Use a modern authenticated cipher such as AES-GCM.", "evidence": "    cipher = DES.new(key)", "line_start": 5, "line_end": 5, "trace_candidates": []}]}
synthesize: One HIGH finding: encrypt() constructs a DES cipher, a broken algorithm.
